paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.12, which represents a 1.16 percent increase from the prior close. Over a window of 20 sessions, the stock price has decreased by 31.77 percent.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with the most recent headline being "Fermi Inc.: Fermi Announces Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Call Date" from FinanzNachrichten.de, announcing that Fermi will host an earnings call on August 13, 2026.

Recent SEC filings include a SCHEDULE 13G and an 8-K filing disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, as well as the resignation of director Miles Everson due to a disagreement over access to company books and records. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed.
